title: (SNK)attack on titans
description: a mod inspired by the anime, adding new items and new mobs
body:
SNK mod:

Basic Titan:

-When it dies, it can drop a sword that deals 250 damage.

-It measures 13 meters.

-It has 250 hearts.

Cart Titan:

-You can ride it and store things in the chest it contains, but to get it to follow you, you must first tame it with raw meat.

-It can ride blackberries that can measure up to 20 meters.

-It is the only titan that doesn't attack you while you're alive.

-It measures 4 meters.

-It has 250 hearts.

Colossal Titan:

-It is considered a boss.

-It has 1000 hearts.

-It measures 60 meters.

- Once dead, he drops a syringe that can give you an enhanced jump effect, strength, and speed for 20 minutes, and you can reuse it as many times as you like.

Beast Titan:

- He has 500 hearts.

- Once dead, he drops the same sword as the base titan.

- He is 17 meters tall.

Jaw Titan:

- Once dead, he drops the same sword as the base titan.

- He is 5 meters tall.

- He is faster than other titans.

- He can climb walls up to 20 meters tall.
